title: Senior Software Engineer - Capital Float Ventures Solutions - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Capital Float Ventures Solutions - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Capital Float Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Capital Float Ventures Solutions:
Capital Float Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capital Float Ventures Solutions!
